Title: Prohibits the public service commission authority to order collection of charges from ratepayers for greenhouse gas reduction unrelated to the electric grid
Summary: Prohibits the public service commission authority to order collection of charges from ratepayers for greenhouse gas reduction unrelated to the electric grid.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to prohibiting the public service commission authority to order collection of charges from ratepayers for greenhouse gas reduction unrelated to the electric grid
